positive: Minimalist graphic design featuring a majestic, stylized silhouette of a mountain range at sunrise. The mountain peaks are rendered in deep indigo and violet ink, set against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky of burnt orange, coral, and gold. Include negative space elements like stylized crescent moon and wandering stars, forming a cohesive pattern suitable for repeating apparel prints. The style should be clean, bold vector illustration, highly detailed yet flat. Composition must be centered and symmetrically balanced. Use strong contrast and flat color blocking.
negative: low resolution, blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient noise, cluttered, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
